chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 657 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.10.2025. Mr. Deen Muhammad Chandio, Advocates for applicant. Mr. Suhbat Ali Lund, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G for State alongwith Inspector Khalil-ur- Rehman SHO Johi. = Counsel for the applicant and respondent including learned D.P.G are at idem and submit jointly that based on the principles laid down in the case of Sughra Bibi (PLD 2018 Supreme Court 595), the concerned I.O in FIR No.87/2025 currently investigating the same incident as pleaded by the Respondent No.4 / complainant in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.2127/2025 before the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Dadu, this Court may direct the I.O to record the further statement of respondent No.4, Anwar s/o Jaro Khan Mastoi and take further action in accordance with law. Order accordingly. The I.O is directed to record the further statement of Respondent No.4 as above within the next 10 days. This Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Tufail
